channel.title: iatlas-browser Learn
channel.description: Daily content about browser automation, MCP tools, and hosted API workflows.

item.title: Browser Automation With Login State: When Your Real Chrome Session Matters
item.description: Need browser automation that keeps cookies, tabs, and authenticated page state? Learn when a local browser bridge is a better fit than a fresh headless browser.

item.title: Hosted Site Adapters vs Local Runtime: Choosing the Right iatlas-browser Path
item.description: Should you use hosted site adapters or the local browser runtime? This guide explains the boundary between remote-safe adapters and browser-state-sensitive workflows.

item.title: Local Browser API for Authenticated Websites: Why 127.0.0.1 Still Matters
item.description: A local browser API is often the safest way to script authenticated websites. Learn when local HTTP control beats a hosted browser endpoint.

item.title: MCP Browser Server for Cursor and Claude Desktop: A Practical Setup Guide
item.description: Looking for an MCP browser server that can work with your real Chrome session? This guide explains when local browser MCP is more useful than a generic scraping tool.

item.title: Webpage Metadata API for Public URLs: A Fast Way to Open, Inspect, and Extract
item.description: Need a simple webpage metadata API for public URLs? This guide explains how to use a hosted endpoint for metadata, text, and HTML without confusing it with full browser automation.
